workflow.name: Start Browser
workflow.description: Start from a fresh tab and navigate to Google.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://www.google.com/

workflow.name: On Google Homepage
workflow.description: Type the search query into the Google search bar.
triggers: If the current URL contains google.com
If a search input with name 'q' is visible
actions: Type 'weather in London' into the search input with name 'q'
Press Enter

workflow.name: On Google Search Results Page (Initial)
workflow.description: Click the 'News' tab to filter results by news.
triggers: If the current URL contains google.com/search?q=weather+in+London
If a button or link with text 'News' is visible
actions: Click the button or link with text 'News'

workflow.name: On Google News Search Results Page
workflow.description: Click the first news article link from the filtered results.
triggers: If the current URL contains google.com/search?q=weather+in+London&tbm=nws
If a search result link is visible
actions: Click the first search result link

workflow.name: On News Article Page
workflow.description: Confirm arrival on the news article page and terminate.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain google.com/search
If a main article heading (e.g., h1) is visible
actions: Terminate: Successfully navigated to the news article.

state_names: On Google News Search Results Page

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to Sauce Labs Demo with provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Add the specified products to the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with class 'inventory_list' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart' next to 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' next to 'Sauce Labs Bike Light'

workflow.name: Items Added, Open Cart
workflow.description: Navigate to the shopping cart after adding items.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a span with class 'shopping_cart_badge' shows '2'
actions: Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed to checkout from the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a button with text 'Checkout' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Information Page
workflow.description: Enter customer information for the checkout process.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input field with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input field with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: On Checkout Overview Page
workflow.description: Confirm the order details and complete the purchase.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If a button with text 'Finish' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Finish'

workflow.name: Order Complete
workflow.description: Confirm that the order has been successfully placed.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-complete.html
If a h2 with text 'THANK YOU FOR YOUR ORDER' is visible
actions: Terminate: Order successfully placed.

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, sort the products by price from low to high, add the two cheapest products to the cart, open the cart, remove one of them, and confirm exactly one item remains

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to the Saucedemo application with provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
If an input field with placeholder 'Password' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Sort products by price (low to high) and add the two cheapest to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If the text 'Products' is visible
If a dropdown with current value 'Name (A to Z)' is visible
actions: Select 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown with current value 'Name (A to Z)'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the first product listed
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the second product listed
Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Remove one item from the cart and confirm exactly one item remains.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If the text 'Your Cart' is visible
If a button with text 'Remove' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Remove' for the first item in the cart
workflow.end_state: Exactly one item remains in the cart

lint_issues.message: Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, click Logout, then go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Enable button, wait for the input field to become enabled, and type hello into it

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter username and password, then submit the form.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a text input with name 'username' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the text input with name 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the password input with name 'password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Secure Area
workflow.description: Verify successful login and then log out.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a div with class 'flash success' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Logout'

workflow.name: Logged Out and Navigating
workflow.description: Confirm logout and navigate to the dynamic controls page.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a div with class 'flash success' contains 'You logged out of the secure area!'
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls

workflow.name: On Dynamic Controls Page - Initial
workflow.description: Click the 'Enable' button to make the input field editable.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Enable' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Enable'

workflow.name: Waiting for Input Field to Enable
workflow.description: Wait for the input field to become enabled after clicking 'Enable'.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Disable' is visible
If the text input with id 'text' is disabled

workflow.name: Input Field Enabled
workflow.description: Type 'hello' into the now-enabled input field.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If the text input with id 'text' is enabled
actions: Type 'hello' into the text input with id 'text'

workflow.name: Task Completed
workflow.description: All actions completed successfully.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If the text input with id 'text' has value 'hello'
actions: Terminate: All specified actions completed.

state_names: Waiting for Input Field to Enable
states_with_no_actions: Waiting for Input Field to Enable

lint_issues.state: Waiting for Input Field to Enable
lint_issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.

sentence: go to automationexercise.com, search for 'dress', add the first two products in the results to your cart, view the cart, and confirm both products are listed

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://automationexercise.com/

workflow.name: On Automation Exercise Homepage
workflow.description: Locate the search bar and search for 'dress'.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Search Product' is visible
actions: Type 'dress' into the input field with placeholder 'Search Product'
Click the button with text 'Search'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page
workflow.description: Add the first two products from the search results to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/products
If the heading 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS' is visible
actions: Hover over the first product card
Click the 'Add to cart' button associated with the first product
Click the 'Continue Shopping' button in the popup
Hover over the second product card
Click the 'Add to cart' button associated with the second product
Click the 'View Cart' button in the popup

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Confirm that both products are listed in the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/view_cart
If the heading 'Shopping Cart' is visible
If two distinct product rows are visible in the cart table

lint_issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.
Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, open the Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket product page, add it to the cart from that page, go back to the products list, open the shopping cart, click checkout, and fill in first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345

workflow.name: Start Browsing
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab and navigate to SauceDemo.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: Login to SauceDemo
workflow.description: Enter credentials and log in to the SauceDemo application.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: Select Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket
workflow.description: Locate and navigate to the product page for Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket.
triggers: If the current URL contains inventory.html
If a div with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the link with text 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'

workflow.name: Add Fleece Jacket to Cart
workflow.description: Add the Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket to the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains inventory-item.html?id=5
If a div with text 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart'

workflow.name: Return to Products List
workflow.description: Navigate back to the main products list after adding an item to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains inventory-item.html?id=5
If a button with text 'Remove' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Back to products'

workflow.name: View Shopping Cart
workflow.description: Open the shopping cart to review selected items.
triggers: If the current URL contains inventory.html
If a link with class 'shopping_cart_link' is visible
actions: Click the link with class 'shopping_cart_link'

workflow.name: Proceed to Checkout
workflow.description: Initiate the checkout process from the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains cart.html
If a button with text 'Checkout' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: Fill Checkout Information
workflow.description: Enter personal details for the checkout process.
triggers: If the current URL contains checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input field with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input field with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: Checkout Information Submitted
workflow.description: Confirm that the checkout information has been successfully entered.
triggers: If the current URL contains checkout-step-two.html
If a div with text 'Checkout: Overview' is visible
actions: Terminate: Checkout information filled
